english-language-arts.schoolName: American Leadership Academy, Queen Creek K-12
english-language-arts.subject: English Language Arts

narrative.headline: English Language Arts: stable or mixed
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students English Language Arts percent passing changed by about -1.7 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 53.0 with likely range 46.0-60.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

mathematics.schoolName: American Leadership Academy, Queen Creek K-12
mathematics.subject: Mathematics

narrative.headline: Mathematics: declining
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students Mathematics percent passing changed by about -3.5 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 43.0 with likely range 36.0-50.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

science.schoolName: American Leadership Academy, Queen Creek K-12
science.subject: Science

narrative.headline: Science: not enough post-2020 data for a forecast
narrative.summarySentence: This school does not have enough numeric FAY All Students history to publish a trend forecast.
narrative.caveatSentence: Suppression or sparse history limits what can be inferred from the available assessment record.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.
